source: Explosive weapons . Our powerful missiles will secure victory for our people.
text: Explosive weapons . Our powerful missiles will secure victory for our people.

source: Strike Craft, our valiant pilots will prove victorious
text: Strike Craft, our valiant pilots will prove victorious

source: This Fleet Doctrine determines which type of ship defenses our ships should emphasize, at the cost of reduced efficiency with the other defensive option.
text: This Fleet Doctrine determines which type of ship defenses our ships should emphasize, at the cost of reduced efficiency with the other defensive option.

source: We will focus on armor and shields in equal measure; there is no need to favor one over the other. They are strongest together.
text: We will focus on armor and shields in equal measure; there is no need to favor one over the other. They are strongest together.

source: Trust in the strength of our Armor. Thick and impenetrable, it surrounds our hulls in its protective embrace, and cannot be ignored by missiles or torpedoes.
text: Trust in the strength of our Armor. Thick and impenetrable, it surrounds our hulls in its protective embrace, and cannot be ignored by missiles or torpedoes.
